query: How do I reset my two-factor authentication if I've lost access to my authenticator app?
search_query: How do I reset my two-factor authentication if I've lost access to my authenticator app?

Security

# Security

## I lost my phone. How can I disable two-factor authentication (2FA)?

![Image 28](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Please contact us via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/security/#) immediately, and we'll help to disable 2FA on your account. When you have a new phone, please [re-enable 2FA](https://deriv.com/account/two-factor-authentication?_gl=1*ijdki0*_gcl_au*NzU4NzM2NDI2LjE3MDQ3OTEzMTUuMzk3Njg1ODk3LjE3MDkyNjk2MTkuMTcwOTI2OTYxOA..).

## How can I identify Deriv customer support impersonators on Telegram?

*   You’re below 18 years old.
*   You may already have a Deriv account.
*   Our services aren't available in your country of residence.

You may refer to [our terms](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf) for more information. If you need help getting into your account, [contact us via live chat.](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#)

‍

## I forgot my Google/Facebook/Apple account password. How can I log in to my Deriv account?

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

If you created your Deriv account using Apple/Google/Facebook, try resetting your Apple/Google/Facebook password. After that, you should be able to log in to Deriv as usual.

If you'd like to log in using your email address instead, follow these steps:

*   Hit [Forgot password?](https://deriv.com/reset-password) on the [login page.](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929)
*   Enter the email address you use for your Apple/Google/Facebook account.
*   We'll email you a verification link. Click that link and set a new password for your Deriv account.
*   Now, you'll be able to log in to your Deriv account using your email address and password.

## How can I close my account?

You may reactivate your account by [logging in](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929) with your email address and password. If you're unable to do so, please [contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#), and we'll help you further.

## Is there any system/website maintenance going on?

![Image 16](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Check our [Status page](https://deriv.statuspage.io/) to see if there is any system or website maintenance going on.

‍

1.   Please log in to your account and go to the “Manage account settings”.
2.   On the left side panel, under the “Security & Safety” category, choose “Email and passwords”, or you may click [here](https://deriv.com/account/passwords?_ga=2.213552532.144519041.1664156028-1088792513.1649824728).
3.   Once you click “Change email”, a verification link is sent to your current email address.
4.   Upon verifying the link in the email, the system will direct you to a pop-up for you to insert the new email address.
5.   Then, you may follow the instructions to change the email address.

Don't worry, if you encounter any issues along the process, please reach out to our support through [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#) for further assistance.

‍

**Note:** If you have lost access to your registered email address, we won’t be able to change it on our end. Contact your email service provider for assistance in regaining access to your email. Once you have regained access to it, follow the steps above to change your email address on Deriv.

## Why can't I create an account?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Here are some possible reasons you aren't able to create an account:

![Image 31](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We’ll prompt you to verify your account when it’s needed.

‍

## How do I verify my account?

![Image 32](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

When we prompt you to verify your account, follow these steps:

*   [Log in](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929) to your Deriv account.
*   Go to [Settings](https://deriv.com/account/personal-details)>**Proof of identity** or **Proof of address**.
*   Follow the instructions on the screen to verify your account.

**Note:** The **Proof of identity** and **Proof of address** pages will not be available if your account doesn’t need verification at this time.

## What documents do I need to verify my account?

![Image 33](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You’ll need the following documents to verify your account:

*   **Proof of identity**

You’ll need a valid government-issued identity document such as a national ID card, passport, or driver's licence. Your document must clearly show your name, photo, and date of birth.

query: "What is the minimum withdrawal amount for bank transfer?"
search_query: "What is the minimum withdrawal amount for a bank transfer?"

retrieved_chunks.text:
![Image 13](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can use any wallet to make the deposit as long as the wallet supports the network we are using.

‍

## What is the minimum deposit and withdrawal for cryptocurrency?

![Image 14](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

There is no minimum deposit for cryptocurrency. The minimum withdrawal is not fixed, so please check for the amount on the [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) page.

## Can I transfer the funds in my account to another person's account?

![Image 15](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No. Fund transfers can only be made within your own accounts.

‍

The currency conversion for your deposits and withdrawals are done by your payment service provider. For example, if you use Skrill, your transaction amount will be converted by Skrill. Please check with your service provider regarding the conversion rates used for your deposits and withdrawals.

## How can I cancel my withdrawal?

![Image 9](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To cancel your withdrawal, follow these steps:

1.   Go to [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal).
2.   We'll send you an email with a verification link. Click that link.
3.   You’ll be brought back to the [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) page. Click **Review pending** and select the transaction that you'd like to cancel.
4.   Click **Yes** to confirm the cancellation. Your funds will be returned to your Deriv account, and your account balance will be updated.

**Note**: You cannot cancel withdrawals if your withdrawal request has already been authorised and processed.

## Can I deposit with my friend's/family member's debit/credit card or e-wallet?

![Image 10](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

![Image 3](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

The minimum deposit and withdrawal amount varies depending on the payment method. The lowest deposit and withdrawal amount is 5 to 10 USD/EUR/GBP/AUD via e-wallets. See our [Payment methods](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) page for a complete list of payment methods and their minimum deposit and withdrawal amounts.

## My withdrawal verification link has expired. What should I do?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Be sure to check the spam or junk section of your email if you do not receive the link in your inbox.

To request a new link, go to [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) and click **Verify my request**. We’ll email you a new link, so please use it within 1 hour.

## How can I remove the withdrawal limit on my account?

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We'll remove the 10,000 USD withdrawal limit once your account has been verified.

## Why did my credit card deposit get declined?

Markdown Content:
## What payment methods can I use for deposits and withdrawals?

![Image 1](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can use debit and credit cards, e-wallets, cryptocurrency wallets, Deriv P2P, online banking, and fiat onramp for deposits and withdrawals (see our [Payment methods page](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) for a detailed list).

Once you log in to your Deriv account, you’ll be able to see payment methods available in your country when you [manage your funds](https://deriv.com/cashier/).

## How long does it take for my deposits and withdrawals to be processed?

![Image 2](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We process your deposits and withdrawals internally within 24 hours (depending on your payment method and internal checks). It may take longer for your funds to reach you due to the different processing times by banks and payment service providers. See our [Payment methods](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) page for a complete list of the processing times for each payment method.

## What is the minimum deposit or withdrawal amount?

*   the Malta Financial Services Authority
*   the Labuan Financial Services Authority
*   the Vanuatu Financial Services Commission
*   the British Virgin Islands Financial Services Commission
*   the Mauritius Financial Services Commission

You can get more info about this on our [Regulatory information](https://deriv.com/regulatory/) page.

## Where is my money held?

![Image 25](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Your money is held in secure financial institutions and is always available to you should you wish to withdraw. We don't use your money for our business purposes.
